admin.address_not_valid: вқҢ Your address doesn't look valid. рҹ”Қ Examples of valid addresses: в–ӘпёҸ BTC-bc1qvwgphnuyvqc07vyylz9c0u6kt72mqtutu4e5sn в–ӘпёҸ LTC-ltc1q73hsjwsudsg7pgpcnyl0nfaym36xxfdq7us4hz в–ӘпёҸ SOL-9MtEizkbNzPqRe2wrBcyfaXQueBihAsBn4popB7YDVXv в–ӘпёҸ ETH-0x3be94a238ec30f2848e5a3e18251b14980c77f7f в–ӘпёҸ BNB-0x3be94a238ec30f2848e5a3e18251b14980c77f7f рҹ”ғ Send another address.
admin.add_items_msg: вқ“ Select the method of adding items:
admin.add_items_subcategory: рҹ—ӮпёҸ Please send subcategory name or "cancel": Example: Subcategory#1
admin.add_items_category: рҹ—ӮпёҸ Please send category name or "cancel": Example: Category#1
admin.add_items_json_msg:
рҹ“„ Send .json file with new items or type "cancel" for cancel. File content example: 
[
  {
    "category_id": 1,
    "subcategory_id": 1,
    "private_data": "KEY-12345-ABCDE",
    "price": 10.00,
    "description": "Premium Item",
    "is_physical": false,
    "shipping_cost": 0.0,
    "allows_packstation": false,
    "price_tiers": [
      {"min_quantity": 1, "unit_price": 10.00},
      {"min_quantity": 5, "unit_price": 9.00},
      {"min_quantity": 10, "unit_price": 8.00}
    ]
  },
  {
    "category_id": 2,
    "subcategory_id": 3,
    "private_data": "SERIAL-XYZ-789",
    "price": 25.00,
    "description": "Physical Product",
    "is_physical": true,
    "shipping_cost": 5.00,
    "allows_packstation": true
  }
]
Note: Category and subcategory IDs must already exist. price_tiers is optional.
admin.add_items_price: рҹ’ө Please send price in {currency_text} or "cancel": Example: 50.0
admin.add_items_private_data: в„№пёҸ Please send the data that the user will receive after purchase. Note: If you enter one line, you will add one product, if you enter multiple lines, you will add multiple products. 1 line=1 item 10 rows=10 items. If you want to abort adding items enter "cancel".
admin.add_items_txt_msg:
рҹ“„ Send .txt file with new items or type "cancel" for cancel. File content example: 
CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;PRIVATE_DATA#1
CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;PRIVATE_DATA#2
CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;PRIVATE_DATA#3
CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;PRIVATE_DATA#4
CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;PRIVATE_DATA#5
CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;PRIVATE_DATA#6
CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;PRIVATE_DATA#7
CATEGORY#1;SUBCATEGORY#1;DESCRIPTION#1;50.0;PRIVATE_DATA#8

user.faq_string: вҡ пёҸ In our store ignorance of the rules does not exempt you from responsibility. Buying at least one product in the store you automatically agree with all the rules of the store! Rules of the store вқ—1.In case of inadequate/offensive behavior the seller has the right to refuse the service! вқ—2.A replacement is provided only if the product is invalid. вқ—3.Replacement is provided only if there is a video proof. вқ—4.30 minutes warranty period. вқ—5.The administration is not responsible for any unlawful actions performed by the buyer with the items purchased in the store. вқ—6.These terms and conditions may change at any time. вқ—7.Money cannot be withdrawn from your balance.

вң… Your shipping address has been received encrypted!

рҹ”’ The address was asymmetrically encrypted with PGP and never left your device in plaintext.
user.gpg_info_text: рҹ”’ Dual-Layer Data Security Your shipping address is doubly protected: 1пёҸвғЈ PGP Encryption (Client-side) вҖў Encryption happens directly on your device вҖў Server only receives encrypted data вҖў Only authorized admins can decrypt 2пёҸвғЈ Encrypted Database вҖў All data additionally stored in encrypted DB вҖў Protection against unauthorized database access вҸ° Automatic Deletion After {retention_days} Days вҖў Data minimization: Only as long as necessary вҖў No permanent storage рҹ’Ў How It Works: During checkout, you'll be asked for your address. Encryption happens on your device before sending, using our public PGP key. рҹ“ҡ Learn More About PGP: gnupg.org
